query: SELECT itemId, name, website, grantEmail, phone, amount, LEFT(description, 100) as desc_preview, applicationProcess, deadline, fundingType, targetDiagnosis, ageRange, geographicScope, b2VisaEligible FROM grants WHERE itemId IN ('item_0001', 'item_0002', 'item_0003');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cK99zxEtGoTfC1g.7228e2c6a840 --database ne96tB4yURpkfMNLLJuy9T --execute SELECT itemId, name, website, grantEmail, phone, amount, LEFT(description, 100) as desc_preview, applicationProcess, deadline, fundingType, targetDiagnosis, ageRange, geographicScope, b2VisaEligible FROM grants WHERE itemId IN ('item_0001', 'item_0002', 'item_0003');

rows.name: 180 Medical Emotional Support and Resources
rows.desc_preview: 180 Medical is a leading provider of sterile-use catheters, ostomy supplies, and other medical suppl
rows.applicationProcess: Contact 180 Medical directly via phone or through their website to discuss needs and available resources. They provide personalized assistance in selecting supplies and offer educational materials.
rows.targetDiagnosis: Ostomy, Spinal Cord Injury, Spina Bifida, Multiple Sclerosis, Transverse Myelitis, Interstitial Cystitis, Neurogenic Bladder, General

rows.name: AAHD Frederick J. Krause Scholarship on Health and Disability
rows.desc_preview: AAHD Scholarship Program The Frederick J. Krause Scholarship on Health and Disability recognizes stu
rows.applicationProcess: Online application through the AAHD website. The application typically requires academic transcripts, letters of recommendation, a personal statement, and proof of disability.

rows.name: Acoustics for Autism
rows.amount: Varies (services provided, not direct cash grants)
rows.desc_preview: Acoustics for Autism is a non-profit organization dedicated to raising awareness and providing suppo
rows.applicationProcess: Families can apply for assistance through an application form available on their website. This typically involves submitting documentation related to the child's diagnosis and the requested services.
rows.deadline: Rolling/Open (applications accepted year-round, funding subject to availability)
